parts.text: {"schema_version": "robotics_plan_draft.v0", "plan_id": "plan_demo_choreography_v2", "source_model": "gemini-robotics-er", "input_refs": {"audio": "audio-ref", "image": "frame-ref", "state": "state-ref"}, "transcript": "bot1は赤い箱へ行き、終わったら所定の位置に戻る。bot2は青い箱へ。bot1が赤い箱の場所から離れたら、bot2は赤い箱の場所へ行き、最後に所定の位置に戻る。", "interpreted_intent": "bot1: red_box then return to berth_A; bot2: blue_box in parallel, then the red_box spot after bot1 has returned (departure approximated by t2 completion, doc02 v1 ruling), then return to berth_B", "detections": [{"id": "red_box", "color": "red", "pixel": [420, 310], "confidence": 0.92}, {"id": "blue_box", "color": "blue", "pixel": [810, 280], "confidence": 0.89}, {"id": "berth_A_marker", "pixel": [420, 1060], "confidence": 0.97}, {"id": "berth_B_marker", "pixel": [810, 1060], "confidence": 0.96}], "task_graph": [{"id": "t1", "robot": "bot1", "action": "navigate", "target": "red_box"}, {"id": "t2", "robot": "bot1", "action": "navigate", "target": "berth_A_marker", "after": "t1.completed"}, {"id": "t3", "robot": "bot2", "action": "navigate", "target": "blue_box"}, {"id": "t4", "robot": "bot2", "action": "navigate", "target": "red_box", "after": "t2.completed"}, {"id": "t5", "robot": "bot2", "action": "navigate", "target": "berth_B_marker", "after": "t4.completed"}], "operator_clarification_required": false}
